title: PipeShare file explorer reconnect fix
description:
After the DB3 binding scope work, switching client/job could leave a stale Wasabi `(clientId, jobId)` in memory. The explorer then called inspection-bindings with the wrong scope, the tree load failed, and the file list cleared even though objects still exist in Wasabi.

Frontend now resets stale storage scope when portal job context changes, refetches when the session cache holds an empty tree, and treats DB3 binding load failures as non-fatal so the explorer still renders. Backend fixes a circular require that was crash-looping PM2 workers (`upsertTenantOwnerAuthSnapshot is not a function`).

Who is affected: pipeshare.live (BASE / private OVH). SaaS picks this up on the next platform release apply.
changeLog: Fix stale remote storage scope blocking PipeShare file tree loads.
Do not wipe the explorer when DB3 inspection bindings fail to load.
Refetch job tree when session cache is fresh but empty.
Break saas-tenant-auth-store ↔ saas-tenant-owner circular require (PM2 restarts).
